basic_details.job_title: APEDA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Manager & Assistant General Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority (APEDA)
basic_details.short_information: The Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority (APEDA) has officially released the Assistant General Manager (Finance) / Assistant Manager (Agriculture) Notification 2026 on 23-05-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Assistant General Manager (Finance) / Assistant Manager (Agriculture) positions. Candidates within the age limit of up to 35 years and holding qualifications such as Post Graduate Degree in Finance/MBA (Finance)/CA or Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture and related disciplines are eligible to apply online at the official website. The application proce

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 500/- for Assistant General Manager (Finance); Rs. 300/- for Assistant Manager (Agriculture)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: PwD: 10 years Ex-Servicemen (ESM): 3 years after deduction of military service Defence Personnel disabled in operation during hostilities with any foreign country or in a disturbed area and released as a consequence thereof: 3 years Employees working in APEDA holding posts on regular basis with at least three years continuous service: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Finance/Financial Management/MBA(Finance) OR Chartered Accountancy; Bachelor Degree in Agriculture/Horticulture/Plantation/Agriculture Engineering/Agriculture and Cooperation/Veterinary Science/Dairy Science/Dairy Technology/Food Processing/Food Processing Technology/Food Technology/Food Science/Food Science and Technology
qualification.details: Assistant General Manager (Finance): Post Graduate Degree in Finance/Financial Management/MBA(Finance) from a recognized University/Institution OR Chartered Accountancy from ICAI with 5 years of experience in the relevant fields post acquiring the educational qualification. Assistant Manager (Agriculture): Bachelor Degree in Agriculture/Horticulture/Plantation/Agriculture Engineering/Agriculture and Cooperation/Veterinary Science/Dairy Science/Dairy Technology/Food Processing/Food Processing Technology/Food Technology/Food Science/Food Science and Technology from a recognized University/Institution.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the APEDA Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of APEDA to complete the application.
